falsification_conditions.condition: The asset price rises by 10% from the current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the pattern's implication of a bottom, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates extreme pressure, refuting the current HOLD by suggesting a different market dynamic.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces an emergency rate cut of 50 basis points or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a drastic intervention would inject liquidity, invalidating the current UNKNOWN verdict by introducing a clear external catalyst.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
